div1.entryFree:
Envenom, 1) to taint with poison: --ed sting, H6B III, 2, 267. darts, Caes. V, 3, 76. Hml. V, 2, 328. Hml. V, 2, 328 Tropically: this report of his did Hamlet so e. with his envy, Hml. IV, 7, 104.
2) to poison, to kill by poison, and to destroy in general: what is comely --s him that bears it, As II, 3, 15. e. him with words, John III, 1, 63.
